Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: intaglio prints [300041338], prints by process: transfer method [300178544], prints by process or technique [300041337], prints (visual works) [300041273], visual works by material or technique [300191091], visual works (works) [300191086], Visual Works (hierarchy name) [300179869], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Prints made from an etched printing plate, which is a metal plate on which a design is made by coating the plate with an acid-resistant substance, creating a design in the coating, and then exposing the plate to acid, which etches the plate where the metal is exposed. For designs incised directly into a copper plate using a burin or graver, use "engravings (prints)."
Estampas realizadas desde una plancha de impresión de aguafuerte.
Diepdrukken, waarbij de in te inkten lijnen door zuur in de metalen plaat zijn gebeten.

Druckgrafik, die von einer radierten Druckplatte abgezogen wurde. Die Platte ist eine Metallplatte, die mit einem säurebeständigen Überzug beschichtet ist, in den die Darstellung gezeichnet und anschließend die Platte einer Säure ausgesetzt wird, die die Platte an den freigelegten Stellen ätzt. Für einen Entwurf, der unter Verwendung eines Stichels direkt in eine Kupferplatte eingeritzt wird, siehe "[Stich (Druckgrafik)](300041340)".

Impressões feitas a partir de uma placa de impressão gravada, que é uma placa de metal na qual é feito um design, revestindo a placa com uma substância resistente ao ácido, criando um design no revestimento e depois expondo a placa ao ácido, que grava a placa onde o metal está exposto. Para desenhos gravados diretamente em uma placa de cobre usando um burin ou gravador, use "gravuras (gravuras)".
Stampe realizzate con la tecnica dell'acquaforte.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001761/Hickerson and Engst, Terms for use in Field 655 (1984)

Term_Source.Page: Candidate term -- Program for Art on Film -- May 1989.

Source.Source_ID: 2000017031/Zinkham and Parker, Descriptive Terms for Graphic Materials (1986)

2000106166/Nomenclature for Museum Cataloging / Nomenclature pour le catalogage translation project (2016-)

Term_Source.Page: Pulin, VanNimmen, LC 10/90 sugg'd as MT; sources indic if is not soft-gr is just called etchings

Source.Source_ID: 2000051389/Vives, Guía para la identificacion de grabados (2003)
